title: tarenna hispidula
intro: Tarenna hispidula, also known as the hispid tarenna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to Southeast Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tarenna hispidula include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potentially lowering cholesterol and blood pressure. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to alleviate various health issues.
